title: November 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 6''' is the 310th day of the year (311th in leap years), with 55 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1943]] - [[Glenn Randall Jr.]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Carolyn Seymour]] is born.
*1947 – [[Vivienne Chandler]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Cam Clarke]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Thandiwe Newton]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Nicole Dubuc]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1989]] – [[Timothy Zahn]]'s literary agent calls with an offer to write novels set in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 45]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 2: Victories and Sacrifices]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]'' webstrip begins.
*[[2007]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender]]'' webcomic begins publishing online.
*[[2013]] – ''[[2013 Topps Star Wars Illustrated: A New Hope]]'' released by [[The Topps Company, Inc.|Topps]].
*[[2017]] – "[[Kindred]]" and "[[Crawler Commandeers]]" air on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Millennium Falcon: A 3D Owner's Guide]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Lando — Double or Nothing]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi Adaptation (TPB)|''Star Wars: The Last Jedi Adaptation'' trade paperback]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader - Dark Lord of the Sith Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Droidography]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 38|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 38]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 10: The Passenger]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 5|''Ahsoka'' 5]] published.
*2024 – [[Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising 4 |''Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising'' 4]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas: Updated Edition]]'' published in the UK.
<noinclude>
